$files = @\(
    'backend/services/agent_service.py',
    'backend/services/task_service.py',
    'backend/services/tool_service.py',
    'backend/services/seed_data.py',
    'backend/services/prompts/__init__.py',
    'backend/routes/tasks.py',
    'backend/routes/files.py',
    'backend/app.py',
    'backend/templates/base.html',
    'backend/static/js/chat.js',
    'backend/static/js/task-detail.js',
    'backend/static/js/terminal.js',
    'backend/tests/test_agent_overhaul.py',
    'start.bat',
    'README.md'
\)
$root = 'C:\\Users\\Shane\\Desktop\\zenflow-rebuild'
foreach \($f in $files\) {
    $path = Join-Path $root $f
    if \(Test-Path $path\) {
        $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\)
        $content = $content -creplace '\\.zenflow', '.sentinel'
        $content = $content -creplace 'Zenflow', 'Sentinel'
        $content = $content -creplace 'zenflow', 'sentinel'
        $utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false
        [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $content, $utf8NoBom\)
        Write-Host "OK: $f"
    } else {
        Write-Host "MISSING: $f"
    }
}
PSEOF)

\)

$results = Select-String -Path $paths -Pattern "zenflow" -CaseSensitive:$false
if \($results\) {

    $results | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.RelativePath\):$\($_.LineNumber\): $\($_.Line.Trim\(\)\)" }

}

Bash("/c/Users/Shane/Desktop/zenflow-rebuild/backend/venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, ''backend''\)
os.environ.setdefault\(''STORAGE_DIR'', ''storage''\)

# Test 1: Import works
from services.error_memory import ErrorMemory, SEED_ENTRIES
print\(f''SEED_ENTRIES count: {len\(SEED_ENTRIES\)}''\)

# Test 2: Check seed_001 has auto_fix
s1 = SEED_ENTRIES[0]
assert ''auto_fix'' in s1, ''seed_001 missing auto_fix''
assert s1[''auto_fix''][''type''] == ''line_remove'', ''seed_001 auto_fix type wrong''
print\(f''seed_001 auto_fix: {s1[""auto_fix""][""type""]} -> {s1[""auto_fix""][""file_pattern""]}''\)

# Test 3: Check seed_009 exists with auto_fix
s9 = [s for s in SEED_ENTRIES if s[''id''] == ''seed_009'']
assert len\(s9\) == 1, ''seed_009 not found''
s9 = s9[0]
assert ''auto_fix'' in s9, ''seed_009 missing auto_fix''
assert s9[''auto_fix''][''type''] == ''regex_replace'', ''seed_009 auto_fix type wrong''
assert ''replace_map'' in s9[''auto_fix''], ''seed_009 missing replace_map''
print\(f''seed_009 auto_fix: {s9[""auto_fix""][""type""]} with {len\(s9[""auto_fix""][""replace_map""]\)} replacements''\)

# Test 4: get_corrective_fixes works
fixes = ErrorMemory.get_corrective_fixes\(filename=''requirements.txt''\)
print\(f''Corrective fixes for requirements.txt: {len\(fixes\)}''\)
for entry, af in fixes:
    print\(f''  - {entry[""id""]}: {af[""description""]}''\)

fixes_py = ErrorMemory.get_corrective_fixes\(filename=''main.py''\)
print\(f''Corrective fixes for main.py: {len\(fixes_py\)}''\)
for entry, af in fixes_py:
    print\(f''  - {entry[""id""]}: {af[""description""]}''\)

# Test 5: on_write filter
fixes_ow = ErrorMemory.get_corrective_fixes\(on_write=True\)
print\(f''On-write corrective fixes \(all\): {len\(fixes_ow\)}''\)

print\(\)
print\(''ALL TESTS PASSED''\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Shane/Desktop/zenflow-rebuild/backend/venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, ''backend''\)
os.environ.setdefault\(''STORAGE_DIR'', ''storage''\)

from services.error_memory import ErrorMemory

# This will trigger ensure_seeded on import, which should:
# 1. Add seed_009 \(missing from DB\)
# 2. Inject auto_fix into seed_001 \(via migrate_entry\)

# Now check the DB
db = ErrorMemory.load\(\)
print\(f''Total entries: {len\(db[""entries""]\)}''\)

has_auto_fix = 0
for e in db[''entries'']:
    if ''auto_fix'' in e:
        has_auto_fix += 1
        print\(f''  {e[""id""]}: auto_fix type={e[""auto_fix""][""type""]}, pattern={e[""auto_fix""][""file_pattern""]}''\)

print\(f''Entries with auto_fix: {has_auto_fix}''\)

# Test get_corrective_fixes now that DB has auto_fix
fixes_req = ErrorMemory.get_corrective_fixes\(filename=''requirements.txt''\)
print\(f''Fixes for requirements.txt: {len\(fixes_req\)}''\)

fixes_py = ErrorMemory.get_corrective_fixes\(filename=''main.py''\)
print\(f''Fixes for main.py: {len\(fixes_py\)}''\)

fixes_ow = ErrorMemory.get_corrective_fixes\(on_write=True\)
print\(f''On-write fixes \(all\): {len\(fixes_ow\)}''\)

# Test record_auto_fix
if fixes_py:
    entry, af = fixes_py[0]
    old_hits = entry.get\(''hits'', 0\)
    old_confirmed = entry.get\(''confirmed'', 0\)
    ErrorMemory.record_auto_fix\(entry[''id''], success=True\)
    # Reload and check
    db2 = ErrorMemory.load\(\)
    for e in db2[''entries'']:
        if e[''id''] == entry[''id'']:
            print\(f''After record_auto_fix: hits {old_hits} -> {e[""hits""]}, confirmed {old_confirmed} -> {e[""confirmed""]}''\)
            break

print\(\)
print\(''ALL TESTS PASSED''\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Shane/Desktop/zenflow-rebuild/backend/venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import sys, os, json
sys.path.insert\(0, ''backend''\)
os.environ.setdefault\(''STORAGE_DIR'', ''storage''\)

# Check the actual JSON for seed_009 details
with open\(''storage/error_memory.json'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    db = json.load\(f\)

# Find all entries with auto_fix
for e in db[''entries'']:
    if ''auto_fix'' in e:
        print\(f''{e[""id""]}:''\)
        print\(f''  sig: {e[""sig""]}''\)
        print\(f''  auto_fix.type: {e[""auto_fix""][""type""]}''\)
        print\(f''  auto_fix.file_pattern: {e[""auto_fix""][""file_pattern""]}''\)
        print\(f''  auto_fix.on_write: {e[""auto_fix""][""on_write""]}''\)
        if ''replace_map'' in e[''auto_fix'']:
            print\(f''  auto_fix.replace_map entries: {len\(e[""auto_fix""][""replace_map""]\)}''\)
        print\(\)

# Count total entries
ids = [e[''id''] for e in db[''entries'']]
print\(f''Entry IDs: {ids}''\)
print\(f''Has duplicate seed_009: {ids.count\(""seed_009""\) > 1}''\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Shane/Desktop/zenflow-rebuild/backend/venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, ''backend''\)
os.environ.setdefault\(''STORAGE_DIR'', ''storage''\)

from services.tool_service import ToolService

# Test 1: Unicode replacement on a .py file
test_py = """"""import sys

def greet\(name\):
    # This function says \\u2018hello\\u2019
    msg = f\\""\\u201cHello, {name}!\\u201d\\""    price = \\u201c99.99\\u201d
    print\(msg\)
""""""

fixed, corrections = ToolService._apply_write_corrections\(test_py, ''main.py''\)
print\(''Test 1 - Unicode in .py:''\)
print\(f''  Corrections: {corrections}''\)
print\(f''  Changed: {fixed != test_py}''\)
print\(f''  Smart quotes removed: {""\\u2018"" not in fixed and ""\\u2019"" not in fixed}''\)
print\(\)

# Test 2: Line removal on requirements.txt
test_req = """"""flask==3.0.0
vite
click
webpack>=5.0
sass
requests
""""""

fixed2, corrections2 = ToolService._apply_write_corrections\(test_req, ''requirements.txt''\)
print\(''Test 2 - Node packages in requirements.txt:''\)
print\(f''  Corrections: {corrections2}''\)
print\(f''  Original lines: {len\(test_req.strip\(\).splitlines\(\)\)}''\)
print\(f''  Fixed lines: {len\(fixed2.strip\(\).splitlines\(\)\)}''\)
print\(f''  Remaining: {[l.strip\(\) for l in fixed2.strip\(\).splitlines\(\) if l.strip\(\)]}''\)
print\(\)

# Test 3: SDD artifact should be skipped
test_md = """"""# Requirements
- The app\\u2019s features should include\\u2026
""""""

fixed3, corrections3 = ToolService._apply_write_corrections\(test_md, ''requirements.md''\)
print\(''Test 3 - SDD artifact skip:''\)
print\(f''  Corrections: {corrections3}''\)
print\(f''  Changed: {fixed3 != test_md}''\)
print\(\)

# Test 4: Non-matching file should be untouched
fixed4, corrections4 = ToolService._apply_write_corrections\(''hello world'', ''image.png''\)
print\(''Test 4 - Non-matching file:''\)
print\(f''  Corrections: {corrections4}''\)
print\(f''  Changed: {fixed4 != ""hello world""}''\)

print\(\)
print\(''ALL TESTS PASSED''\)
")
